name: mobile-release-kit
description: Ship Expo/RN apps to the App Store & Play Store: screenshot capture, device-frame rendering, EAS release runbooks.
skillInstructions: Kimi Code tool mapping: when a skill says to ask the user / present options, call Kimi's AskUserQuestion. When a skill refers to TodoWrite, use Kimi's TodoList. When a skill says to dispatch a subagent, use Kimi's Agent tool (subagent_type 'coder' for implementation, 'explore' for read-only search, 'plan' for design) — never pass 'general-purpose'. Use Kimi's Read/Write/Edit/Bash/Grep/Glob/FetchURL/WebSearch and MCP tools by their actual names.

interface.shortDescription: Store screenshots, device frames, and EAS release for Expo/RN apps
